title: The native workflow shell still trails runtime-shell comparator on setup, doctor, HUD, and team-runtime ergonomics
resolution: Track under todo priority 2 and keep the proof-first closeout advantage while making the operator shell lighter.

title: The native workflow surface still trails workflow-teaching comparator on explicit brainstorming, planning, debugging, review, and branch-finish teaching
resolution: Track under todo priority 3 and add first-class native plan and debug guidance instead of relying on doctrine alone.

title: The current memoriesv2 product is durable but not yet benchmarked or as semantically rich as memory-product comparator
resolution: Track under todo priority 4 and add benchmarked recall, deeper semantic retrieval, and deliberate memory-product features.

title: The current code-search surface is useful but does not yet match indexing comparator on incremental semantic indexing, lineage, and query parity
resolution: Track under todo priority 5 and evolve code-search toward incremental semantic indexing with explicit lineage.

title: Older repo wording used the legacy workflow-teaching label instead of the live public workflow-teaching comparator repo identity used by this audit
resolution: Closed after shared benchmark docs and tests were updated to use anonymized workflow-teaching comparator wording without preserving the older hardcoded project label.
